name: zhiwen-skills
description: Zhiwen's personal Claude Code skills marketplace

plugins.name: tech-tutorial
plugins.description: Builds English-first, cognitive-science-aligned HTML tutorials for technical topics. Concept-focused by default (scenario walkthroughs for mental models), with an optional hands-on mode (runnable code progression). Structure is a scaffold: index first, self-check last, topical chapters in between sized by a concept dependency graph. Grounded in research on encoding, learning depth, and current field context.

plugins.name: visual-explainer
plugins.description: Designs one-topic concept diagrams, preserves editable Excalidraw scene sources, and exports them as SVG explainers.

plugins.name: book-to-skill
plugins.description: Transforms book-like sources into focused agent skills with source maps, evals, and validation helpers.

plugins.name: explain-article
plugins.description: Writes researched explanatory Markdown articles with reader fit, mechanisms, examples, Mermaid diagrams, boundaries, and understanding checks.
